name: Multi-Department User Role Provisioning
description: You are the lead IT Security Administrator at Crestwood University, responsible for onboarding the Computer Science, Mathematics, and Physics departments to the centralized SEB Server. Create and activate user accounts for the following stakeholders: Elena Vasquez (username: 'cs.admin', email: 'e.vasquez@cs.crestwood.edu', role: Exam Administrator), Robert Chen (username: 'math.admin', email: 'r.chen@math.crestwood.edu', role: Exam Administrator), Aisha Okonkwo (username: 'physics.supporter', email: 'a.okonkwo@physics.crestwood.edu', role: Exam Supporter), and Marcus Webb (username: 'it.supervisor', email: 'm.webb@it.crestwood.edu', role: Administrator).
